# Invincio Services LLP

> India's premier SSB interview mentorship institute, run exclusively by Ex-SSB Assessors (GTOs, Interviewing Officers and Psychologists) who have personally evaluated thousands of candidates at Services Selection Boards.

Invincio is a Leadership Transformation Institute focused on personality evolution rather than rote memorisation. We prepare candidates for India's defence officer entries — NDA, CDS, AFCAT, TES, TGC — through diagnostic profiling, personalised development roadmaps, and conference-level rehearsals aligned with actual SSB board expectations.

## Key facts
- Headquartered in New Delhi, India
- Founded 2018
- Founder & lead mentor: Lt Col Ankur Sabharwal (Retd.)
- Mentor team: exclusively Ex-SSB Assessors (GTOs, IOs, Psychologists)
- Modes: online and onsite
- Languages: English, Hindi
- Contact: +91 86014 07444, invincio_soldier@outlook.com

## Programs
- [SSB Interview Coaching](https://www.invincioservices.com/programs/ssb-interview): 5-day immersive SSB preparation covering screening, psych tests, GTO, personal interview and conference.
- [NDA, CDS & AFCAT Written Exam](https://www.invincioservices.com/programs/written-exam): Structured, mentor-driven written exam preparation for all major defence entries.
- [Future Leader Bootcamp](https://www.invincioservices.com/programs/future-leader): Early Officer Like Quality development for school and college aspirants.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.invincioservices.com/): Overview of mentorship, programs and selection results.
- [About](https://www.invincioservices.com/about): Mentor team and institute philosophy.
- [Why Invincio](https://www.invincioservices.com/difference): The Ex-SSB Assessor advantage.
- [Process](https://www.invincioservices.com/process): Step-by-step mentorship workflow.
- [Results](https://www.invincioservices.com/results): Recommended-candidate success stories.
- [FAQ](https://www.invincioservices.com/faq): Common questions about mentorship, repeaters and online programs.

## Differentiators
- Mentors who have served as actual SSB Assessors — not coaches who reverse-engineer the system.
- Personalised development roadmap per candidate, not a one-size-fits-all classroom.
- Repeater specialisation: psychological diagnosis of previous conference-outs.
- Personality-led OLQ (Officer Like Quality) development.
